faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offer best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: What is the Scope of Humanities and Social Science courses?
faqs.answer:
Humanities as a stream provides a wide range of courses that can be studied after completing their 12th grade. Pursuing any of these degrees prepares you to understand the various levels of humanities and, as a result, carve out an appropriate job path. Candidates in the humanities can apply for positions in the government sector, such as banking firms, government ministries, legal firms, and political analysts.
Content Writer, Civil Services, Human Resource Manager, Defense Services, Lawyer, Journalist, Counsellor, and Therapist positions are available. As freshers, humanities graduates can expect to earn between INR 2-6 LPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Narwana and provides all facilities related to study.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides good placements. Almost 80% of students got placed in good companies with good salary packages. The highest salary package offered for our course ranges between 7 LPA - 8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 2 LPA - 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very excellent. Our college provides facilities like a cisco computer lab, a library, a boxing ring, a football field, a cricket ground, a badminton court, and a kho-kho ground. Classrooms are very clean. Our college has a small canteen.

reviews_list.review_title: I didn't face any problems in college. It is very good.

review_content.Placements: The K. M government college does not provide any placements. You will not get any placements if you join this college at the current time. For placement, you should go to another college or university that provides placements in the best companies that offer a good package.
review_content.Infrastructure: The first thing I like is the college library. It is very big. A lot of books, A. C. and comfortable chairs for sitting available in the library. It is a very silent place. The classrooms are good. Wi-Fi is not available. A canteen is available on the college campus but there isn't any hostel.

reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good to complete your bachelor degree. It is the best college in district Jind.

review_content.Placements: K. M government college is a small college of city Narwana affiliated with CRSU University Jind. Several courses are available in this college like B.A. B.Sc. B.Com M.A. etc. But it doesn't provide any placements. For placement, you need to go to high colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms of K. M college are old. Labs and libraries are available on the campus. A small one is also available in college. From time to time medical camps were held in college. NCC and NSS are both trades available. There isn't any hostel facility available on the college campus.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an average institution for completing your graduation.

review_content.Placements: There are no companies that want to give placements to simple graduates. Our institute doesn't provide placements and all, but you can go to university for further studies and then you have to work hard and get placements there. Internships, nothing like that I guess. Graduate courses are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Visit our college and you'll find out why I rated 2 stars. There are offices for faculty members, or the whole faculty is in a single room. The canteen is shut down and the campus has no Wi-Fi connection. Not all rooms are air-conditioned and fans also don't work sometimes, so that's why I rated 2 stars.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Shree Swaminarayan Institute of Technology, Gandhinagar admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Shree Swaminarayan Institute of Technology, Gandhinagar:

reviews_list.review_title: College life and nature of Shree Swaminarayan Institute of Technology, Gandhinagar.

review_content.Placements: Here, students scoring 65% get admission to this college. The highest package was 7 lakhs. In our college, students can get offers from abroad for jobs. The top role offered is in computer engineering, and a minimum of 7 SPI is required in all seven semesters.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are mainly two buildings, each containing three floors. There are many classrooms and one library that also includes an e-library. Ethernet is provided in our college. There are many sports activities, including cricket, football, carrom, volleyball, chess, model making, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of SSIT from a student's POV.

review_content.Placements: SSIT has achieved the highest package of 14 LPA. The college hosts clubs like GDSC, RSVP Coders Club, and provides SSIP Portals. Entrepreneurship training is offered, and industry visits are organized. The average package is about 5 LPA. The college actively works on placements and internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: In SSIT, there is only a boys' hostel, so girls have to find a PG. To be very honest, the infrastructure is average. The campus and all facilities are clean. There's a very small canteen with limited stock available. The library is vast and has a silent environment. There are limited labs. The quality of food available here is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure, but attendance is compulsory, and faculty members are friendly.

review_content.Placements: 70–80% of students are placed. The highest package is INR 12 lakh, the lowest is INR 3.2 lakh, and the average is INR 4.5 lakh (per annum). L&T, ONGC, BHEl, Khodiyar Cad Center, etc. are the top recruiting companies. 100% of students got internships in various companies like Khodiyar Cad Center, ONGC, BHEL, and other multinational companies. General manager is the top role offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, library, clean classrooms, projectors for animation of processes, clean drinking water, toilets, seminar hall, volleyball court, badminton court, cricket ground, football ground, parking, canteen, workshop, IC engine lab, etc. are available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good college because the faculty is good and the placements are also good.
reviews.review_text: Shree Swami Narayan Institute of Technology has good infrastructure available for your B.Tech course. The computer engineering classrooms are good, and labs are available in the B.Tech. Hostels are good, the mess, canteen and medical facilities are available on campus. Many other sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: My college is really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is neither good nor bad. It is above average, but the canteen and mess quality of food is good, and the sports and games facilities are very good. The main part of my college is sports. The quality of the hostel at my college is good and enjoyable.

reviews.review_heading: College life and nature of Shree Swaminarayan Institute of Technology, Gandhinagar.
reviews.review_text: There are mainly two buildings, each containing three floors. There are many classrooms and one library that also includes an e-library. Ethernet is provided in our college. There are many sports activities, including cricket, football, carrom, volleyball, chess, model making, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SSIT from a student's POV.
reviews.review_text: In SSIT, there is only a boys' hostel, so girls have to find a PG. To be very honest, the infrastructure is average. The campus and all facilities are clean. There's a very small canteen with limited stock available. The library is vast and has a silent environment. There are limited labs. The quality of food available here is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, but attendance is compulsory, and faculty members are friendly.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, library, clean classrooms, projectors for animation of processes, clean drinking water, toilets, seminar hall, volleyball court, badminton court, cricket ground, football ground, parking, canteen, workshop, IC engine lab, etc. are available at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is also available, and labs are also available in the college. A library is also available. There is a hostel available at the college. Canteens and medical facilities are extremely important, and they provide these services. S ports and games facilities are available. There is a cricket ground, which is why I am enrolled in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college and faculty members are also very supportive.
reviews.review_text: All courses are designed by Gujarat Technological University, and this college has well-equipped computer laboratories running windows 10 OS, and all required software has a dedicated server room for maintaining laboratory computers. The campus has a huge playground. The library is equipped with all books.

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are very good. Classrooms, computer labs, Library, canteen, Physics lab, workshop, etc. Facilities are provided by the college. Sports and games like cricket, football, volleyball, chess, etc. Are the extra facilities which are provided by the college .

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with the college faculty, infrastructure is also good, study level is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available are good, infrastructure is nice also. Cleanliness is there as there is good infrastructure and with that, students can concentrate on their studies. Good library books are available which is helpful for doing preparation.

reviews.review_heading: Education is good in this college but the atmosphere of college is not good with very less facility.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi in our campus, there are 4-5 labs without any equipment. Our classroom is quite good but it's not clean always. There is digital library in my institute which has both books and books. There is a small hostel with around 30 rooms with good facilities. The quality of food is quite good but in less quantity. There is no sports and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Really nice infrastructure and education
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good. There is experiment labs, computer lab, big library with reading place and cricket ground is available . In my college sports and games are also available to play like volleyball, cricket, kabbady and some indoor games like chess.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a very enjoyable playground and very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Many facilities are available here like labs, workshops, a huge library, clean classrooms, enjoyable playground, volleyball ground, cricket ground, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest not to take admission in SSIT.
reviews.review_text: Not any facilities. No Wi-Fi. You cannot use mobile phone in break also. The worst rules. The worst management. No campus interview. We have to find job on own. And college declare it as campus placement. Such a liar college. Quality if classroom is also bad. Please don't take admission in this college and save your future.

reviews.review_heading: It is a partially good experience.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in this college are top-notch. As a Computer Engineering student, I have to use computer labs, and labs here are well-equipped. The library and classrooms are also very well-maintained. The food in the canteen is not that good. Sports and cultural activities here are amazing. I participate in several activities, and the experience is good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and favilities.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available like labs classrooms , library. Hostel food is okay okay but canteen medical facilities and sports are so good. Annule sport week is arranged every year for student.many function like Ganesh chaturthi, navratri is celebrated in here.
